events.name: Reinforcements
events.description: One side receives reinforcements granting significant additional manpower or new capabilities.
events.player_effect: Add a new unit to your force or add an additional unit to the enemy next mission.
events.operational_effect: One army gains +1 Army Strength.

events.name: Critical Strike
events.description: One side launches an attack against an important or high priority target.
events.player_effect: Play out the mission.
events.operational_effect: If mission succeeds, reduce an army at 4+ Army Strength by 1.

events.name: New Main Character
events.description: The focal character of the player's forces changes.
events.player_effect: Choose or create a new character that becomes your main character.
events.operational_effect: None.

events.name: Flashback
events.description: Play out an event that took place in the past for a character, unit, or the current conflict.
events.player_effect: Play through the events.
events.operational_effect: None.

events.name: Balance is Shifting
events.description: One side is gaining the upper hand and making advances.
events.player_effect: None.
events.operational_effect: In one Zone, add +1 Army Strength and adjust enemy Army Strength by -1.

events.name: Shortfall
events.description: One side is short on a resource such as fuel or ammunition.
events.player_effect: None.
events.operational_effect: One army with 4+ Army Strength is reduced by 1.

events.name: New Character
events.description: A new character is introduced to the campaign story.
events.player_effect: Add a new character to your force.
events.operational_effect: None.

events.name: New Ally
events.description: One side gains a new ally.
events.player_effect: Create a new force, operation, or add an unusual unit.
events.operational_effect: Add a new Zone. Ally has Army Strength 4, enemy has Army Strength 2.

events.name: Loss of Initiative
events.description: The side on the defensive gains the initiative and dictates events.
events.player_effect: None.
events.operational_effect: Side with lowest Morale may add +1 Army Strength, then conduct Operational Combat in that Zone.

events.name: Change of Perspective
events.description: The campaign shifts to a new perspective. *Dramatic — may reroll if doesn't fit.
events.player_effect: Choose one side or faction you are now playing as.
events.operational_effect: None.

events.name: Unconventional Operation
events.description: One side launches a special operations mission.
events.player_effect: Play out the mission.
events.operational_effect: Select an enemy army and roll 1D6. Below Army Strength = reduced by 1.

events.name: Loss of Capability
events.description: One side loses a combat capability (artillery, air movement, etc.)
events.player_effect: Unable to use that capability next turn.
events.operational_effect: The target cannot carry out an Order this turn.

events.name: Side Story
events.description: A secondary story unfolds during the conflict. *Dramatic — may reroll if doesn't fit.
events.player_effect: Play through the side story.
events.operational_effect: None.

events.name: Unit Reassignment
events.description: A unit is reassigned from the current area and given new duties elsewhere.
events.player_effect: One unit leaves and is replaced with a new unit.
events.operational_effect: None.

events.name: Change in Strategy
events.description: One side decides to adopt a new strategy to gain the upper hand.
events.player_effect: Reflect the change in the next scenario.
events.operational_effect: The side carries out two Orders this turn.

events.name: Change of Focus
events.description: The Operational Focus changes to a new area of the conflict.
events.player_effect: Choose a new area to play in.
events.operational_effect: Change the Operational Focus or create a new operation.

events.name: Transfer In
events.description: A unit is transferred in from another formation or from off-world.
events.player_effect: Add a unit to your force.
events.operational_effect: Player's Zone gains +1 Army Strength if currently 4 or less.

events.name: Front Transfer
events.description: The focal unit is transferred to a different area of the conflict.
events.player_effect: Select what area you will now be fighting in.
events.operational_effect: Move the player's forces to a different Operational Zone.

events.name: R&R
events.description: The focus unit is given a chance to rest, recover and be refitted.
events.player_effect: Make any force changes: unit types, weapons, vehicles. Recover casualties and conduct repairs.
events.operational_effect: Player's Zone raised to Army Strength 3 if currently 3 or less.

events.name: New Front Opens
events.description: A new area is added to the overall conflict.
events.player_effect: Play out a battle on the new front. Decide if you want to shift focus.
events.operational_effect: Add Operational Zone. Both sides Army Strength 4. Conduct Operational Combat this turn.

events.name: Remote Conflict
events.description: A conflict breaks out in a different country, planet, or system tied to the current conflict. *Dramatic — may reroll.
events.player_effect: Play out a battle in the new conflict. Decide if you want to shift focus.
events.operational_effect: Creates a new Operational conflict.
